raw_text:
Overview
Implementation of National Biosafety Measures to Promote National Security
Regional and National Biosecurity
Building National Biosecurity Capacity
National Implementation of Prohibition of Biological Weapons Convention
Strengthen National lBiosecurity via Academic and Research Institules
This Activity for
- Other health care provider
- Respiratory Therapy
- Psychology
- Podiatry
- Physiotherapy
- Optometry
- Clinical Nutrition
- Nursing and Midwifery
- Dentistry and Related Specialties
- Resident / Fellow
- Physician
- Pharmacy
What I will learn?
Conference Objectives:
- Review common strategies to providing care in the optimum methods.
- Facilitate discussion and learning about recent health practices that can be used in inpatient health plans.
- Provide a deep administrative overview where the team can follow a valid information scheme.
- Review common strategies to providing care in the optimum methods.
- Facilitate discussion and learning about recent health practices that can be used in inpatient health plans.
- Provide a deep administrative overview where the team can follow a valid information scheme.
